name: Emma Wilson
bio: Former colleague turned close friend. Met at my first job five years ago and bonded over late-night debugging sessions.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: College roommate turned startup co-founder. Always up for chess or a deep conversation about the future of tech.

name: Aisha Patel
bio: Senior engineer who shaped how I write software. Her code reviews were brutally honest and incredibly valuable.

name: Tom Baker
bio: Travel buddy who got me into backpacking across Southeast Asia. We share a goal of visiting 30 countries before 35.

name: Sarah Chen
bio: Best friend from university. Now a pediatric doctor in Vancouver. We do monthly virtual dinners despite being 8 time zones apart.

name: Olivia Martinez
bio: Neighbor who became like family. Her weekly homemade tamales are legendary. Our families share Sunday dinners every week.

name: Ryan O'Brien
bio: Childhood friend since kindergarten. We built a treehouse together on our street. Now he is raising his own kids in our hometown.

name: Lisa Nakamura
bio: Freelance designer and creative collaborator. Her sense of color and typography has deeply influenced my aesthetic taste.

name: Daniel Osei
bio: Gym partner and study buddy from college. We kept each other accountable through finals and now through life in general.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Book club co-founder and intellectual sparring partner. Our monthly meetings turn into four-hour philosophical debates over tea.
